title: agrostis maritima subsp. clementei
intro: Agrostis maritima subsp. clementei, also known as Clement's bent-grass or Clement's bent, is a subspecies of the Agrostis maritima plant, a type of grass native to the Atlantic coast of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis maritima subsp. clementei include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
